name: WeRead
description: A native WeRead client for TrimUI handhelds.
author: Lin0u0

changelog.v0.1.8: Added real cover art for公众号文章, normalized qlogo cover URLs, and fixed the shelf rendering path so article covers stay visible even when the first normal book is selected.
changelog.v0.1.7: Added first-class WeRead article support with separate shelf handling, article catalogs and font sizing, smoother cross-chapter paging, faster catalog opening, and cooler shelf idle behavior.
changelog.v0.1.6: Hardened the TrimUI release path with preflight diagnostics, package archive audits for NextUI/Stock/CrossMix, and CI that now runs the same verified make-based release flow as maintainers.
changelog.v0.1.5: Reduced CPU usage and device heat during idle reading and browsing with event-driven sleep, non-blocking haptics, and smarter render skipping.
changelog.v0.1.4: Polished reader navigation with smoother catalog selection, confirm-to-exit from reading, and faster nearby shelf cover loading. Also refactored reader and UI helpers into dedicated modules for easier maintenance.
changelog.v0.1.3: Improved reader layout, restored system OSD hotkeys, and added tg5040 haptic feedback.
